introSection: Whistle Punk Chaser is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Dollywood in Pigeon Forge, Tennessee, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: In October 2016, Dollywood announced the addition of Drop Line and Whistle Punk Chaser.

sections.title: Etymology
sections.content: Both "Whistle Punk" and "Chaser" are job titles within a logging team.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Whistle Punk Chaser is one of Zamperla's Family Gravity Coaster 80STD models, similar to Grand Exposition Coaster at Silver Dollar City.

fullText:
Whistle Punk Chaser is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Dollywood in Pigeon Forge, Tennessee, USA.

In October 2016, Dollywood announced the addition of Drop Line and Whistle Punk Chaser.

Both "Whistle Punk" and "Chaser" are job titles within a logging team.

Whistle Punk Chaser is one of Zamperla's Family Gravity Coaster 80STD models, similar to Grand Exposition Coaster at Silver Dollar City.
